source_pr.title: *: Txn() function signature refactor and remove ActivePendingTxn()
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Clean up after https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/8260

### What is changed and how it works?

* change `Txn()` function signature to `Txn(active bool)`
* `ActivePendingTxn()` is not used any more because `Txn()` does the work
* change executor builder `getStartTS() uint64` to `getStartTS() (uint64, error)`


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

@zz-jason @jackysp @zimulala @winkyao

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: Txn() function signature refactor and remove ActivePendingTxn().
fix_pattern: *: Txn() function signature refactor and remove ActivePendingTxn()
